sections.name: Dashboard
sections.description: System overview with stat cards, weekly activity bar chart (Chart.js), and recent activity feed

sections.name: Projects
sections.description: Grid of 6 project cards with status badges, progress bars, task counts, and due dates

sections.name: Workspace
sections.description: Tabbed editor/preview/notes interface with contenteditable rich text and Rough.js preview sketches

sections.name: Kanban
sections.description: 4-column kanban board (Backlog/To Do/In Progress/Done) with 12 draggable cards via SortableJS

sections.name: Whiteboard
sections.description: Canvas-based drawing area with tool selector, grid background, and draggable sticky notes

sections.name: Schema Planner
sections.description: 4 entity cards (Users/Projects/Ideas/Tasks) with field types, badges (PK/FK/UQ), and Rough.js relation lines

sections.name: Directory Tree
sections.description: Collapsible file tree with file preview panel showing mock TypeScript/JSON content

sections.name: Ideas
sections.description: Filterable grid of 8 idea cards with priority badges, tags, author info, and timestamps

sections.name: AI Chat
sections.description: Chat interface with 6 messages, user/AI avatars, message input with Enter-to-send, and simulated AI responses

sections.name: Settings
sections.description: Profile form, preference toggles, integrations list, and danger zone with export/delete actions

accessibility.focusIndicators: 3px solid outline on all interactive elements
